return(function(h,t,r,P,M,j,f,i,g,V,R,p,X,l,v,W,w,B,K,S,Q,Z,U)S,Z,R,g,Q,v,K,i,V,p,B,U,X,l,W,w=function(h,I)local t=U(I)local r=function(...)return l(h,{...},I,t)end return r
